Testimonials
What Our Clients Say
★★★★★

"We booked a private tailor-made China tour with Nihaohuaxia, and it far surpassed our expectations. We're extremely satisfied with our dedicated tour guide and interpreter throughout the whole trip. Every arrangement was perfectly organised, from hassle-free airport pick-up and drop-off to carefully selected authentic local dining spots. The guide was not only highly knowledgeable about Chinese culture and history but also very friendly, attentive and thoughtful all the way. We absolutely loved the personalised service and would wholeheartedly recommend Nihaohuaxia to anyone planning a private trip to China."

Heidi Doucette · Canada

★★★★★

"Nihaohuaxia turned our company trip to Guangzhou, Shenzhen and Foshan into an absolutely amazing experience. We had very specific requests for our visit — city landmarks, modern business districts and traditional Lingnan culture spots in Foshan — and they arranged everything exactly as we wanted. Their personalised service and deep local knowledge are truly impressive, much better than any travel agency we've used before. Everything was well organised from start to finish."
